nodes.label: Create a Supabase project for Kavi ki Vidya.
nodes.norm_label: create a supabase project for kavi ki vidya.

nodes.label: Add public Supabase URL and publishable key to the Expo env file.
nodes.norm_label: add public supabase url and publishable key to the expo env file.

nodes.label: Create the `learner_progress` table in Supabase using the schema in `docs/technical/backend.md`.
nodes.norm_label: create the `learner_progress` table in supabase using the schema in `docs/technical/backend.md`.

nodes.label: Add `SUPABASE_URL` to the local server env file.
nodes.norm_label: add `supabase_url` to the local server env file.

nodes.label: Add `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` to the local server env file.
nodes.norm_label: add `supabase_service_role_key` to the local server env file.

nodes.label: Set `PROGRESS_STORAGE_PROVIDER=supabase-rest` when ready to test Supabase-backed progress sync.
nodes.norm_label: set `progress_storage_provider=supabase-rest` when ready to test supabase-backed progress sync.

nodes.label: Run a Supabase-backed progress sync test and confirm progress still appears on the Profile tab.
nodes.norm_label: run a supabase-backed progress sync test and confirm progress still appears on the profile tab.

nodes.label: Remove Google and Apple OAuth from the current production scope.
nodes.norm_label: remove google and apple oauth from the current production scope.

nodes.label: Use a local learner profile with Supabase-backed progress persistence.
nodes.norm_label: use a local learner profile with supabase-backed progress persistence.

nodes.label: Confirm OpenAI API billing/credits are active for the API key.
nodes.norm_label: confirm openai api billing/credits are active for the api key.

nodes.label: Confirm `OPENAI_API_KEY` is present only in server-side env files, not in any `EXPO_PUBLIC_*` variable.
nodes.norm_label: confirm `openai_api_key` is present only in server-side env files, not in any `expo_public_*` variable.

nodes.label: Test voice transcription from the iOS simulator/device microphone.
nodes.norm_label: test voice transcription from the ios simulator/device microphone.

nodes.label: Test one complete speaking session: record, transcribe, coach reply, feedback, and review item.
nodes.norm_label: test one complete speaking session: record, transcribe, coach reply, feedback, and review item.

nodes.label: Decide whether the first backend target is Supabase or a custom managed API.
nodes.norm_label: decide whether the first backend target is supabase or a custom managed api.

nodes.label: Decide the first internal testing platform: TestFlight, Android internal testing, or both.
nodes.norm_label: decide the first internal testing platform: testflight, android internal testing, or both.

nodes.norm_label: create production privacy copy for speech audio, ai processing, progress sync, and account deletion.
